title: Microsoft in Talks to Ax Energy Pledge Amid Data Center Boom
description: Microsoft Corp. is in discussions to shelve one of the industry’s most ambitious clean-energy targets as it tries to remove hurdles that could hold it back in the race to power data centers, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: AMD Soars After AI Demand Fuels Better-Than-Expected Outlook
description: Advanced Micro Devices Inc., the leading challenger to Nvidia Corp. in AI computing chips, reached a record high after a flood of data center spending bolstered its sales forecast.

title: DoorDash Shares Jump on Order Forecast That Tops Estimates
description: DoorDash Inc. shares rallied after the delivery company gave a forecast for order value in the current period that topped analyst estimates, signaling healthy consumer demand for its services in the US and international markets.
